notes: Highly complete Asteroids implementation with hyperspace, UFO, heartbeat, audio, wrap-around rendering, debris, and wave progression — minor visual quirk with the ship shape using y:12 base instead of classic pointed tail, but overall excellent.

A strong and mostly complete Asteroids clone with solid mechanics and presentation, but it is not flawless due to some non-authentic design choices and likely gameplay rough edges around pacing, respawn fairness, and control/input feel.
